Name: CRM Core
description: Primary CRM application handling contacts, deals, and workflows

Name: API Gateway
description: Central API gateway for all external and internal API traffic

Name: Analytics Engine
description: Real-time analytics and reporting for CRM data

Name: Mobile API
description: Backend-for-frontend serving the OvocoCRM mobile apps

Name: Notification Service
description: Manages email, SMS, and push notification delivery

Name: Search Service
description: Full-text search across contacts, deals, and documents
